Sandbox_BusStop_CurrencyItem_tooltip: Item type used as bus fare currency (e.g. Base.Money).
Sandbox_BusStop_BasePrice_tooltip: Base cost in currency items for any trip, regardless of distance.
Sandbox_BusStop_PricePerTile_tooltip: Extra cost per tile of distance for dynamic pricing. Value is multiplied by 0.001 — default 1 means 0.001 per tile.
